title: France's Socialists hold on to power in major cities in election boost for mainstream
summary_full: Paris and Marseille are held by the Socialists in local elections which saw the nationalist right win in Nice and certain towns.
summary_public: Paris and Marseille are held by the Socialists in local elections which saw the nationalist right win in Nice and certain towns.
